memoryArtifacts.headline: Depiction of Ragnall's seal [Front]
memoryArtifacts.description:
This late nineteenth-century interpretation of Ragnall's now non-existent seal is an unauthentic depiction of how the original would have looked. [Reverse]
On one side, the seal is described to have depicted a ship, filled with men-at-arms. On the reverse side, the seal was said to have depicted a man on horseback, armed with a sword in his hand.

zh.Morven, Argyle, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾莫文
zh.<Of, Morven, Argyle, Scotland>: 英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾莫文
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles於大約1148年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾莫文時，他的父親Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles36歲，母親Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir32歲。他於大約1160年與Fonia Moray在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1192年登記服兵役。他去世於1207年在蘇格蘭阿吉爾享年60歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.Morven, Argyle, Scotland: 英国苏格兰阿吉爾莫文
zh-hans.<Of, Morven, Argyle, Scotland>: 英国苏格兰阿吉爾莫文
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles于大约1148年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾莫文时，他的父亲Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles36岁，母亲Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir32岁。他于大约1160年与Fonia Moray在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1192年登记服兵役。他去世于1207年在苏格兰阿吉爾享年60岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Mac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Cuong, Minh, Lien, Muoi, Thanh, Tho, Tieu, Vinh, Anh, Beo, Binh, Chau.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 麥 (see   Mai   2) and 莫 (see   Mo   1).
Vietnamese (Mạc): from Chinese 莫 ‘nothing; nonexistent’; see Mo 1.

variants.name: Mai
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Thanh, Hoa, Son, Dung, Long, Binh, Minh, Thu, Hue, Huong, Thuy.  Chinese Chi, Hong, Ho, Sang, Han, Hang, Jian, Li, Man, Mei, Sen, Wei.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 麥, meaning ‘wheat’ in Chinese: (i) from Mai Qiu (麥丘), the title of a man in the state of Qi (located mainly in present-day Shandong province) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), who, despite being very old, came to celebrate the birthday of the Duke Huan of Qi (ruler of the state of Qi, died 643  BC ). His descendants inherited 麥, the first part of his title, as their surname. (ii) borne by descendants of Mai Tie Zhang (麥鐵杖), a famous general during the Sui dynasty (581–618  AD ). His descendants were scattered around southern China.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 買, meaning ‘buy’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of the king Song Weizi, founder of the state of Song. (ii) borne by descendants of the Duke Dao of Xu (ruler of the state of Xu, 546–523  BC ), possibly inheriting his personal name. (iii) from the first element of the personal name Mai Zhu Chu (買朱鉏), style name of an official who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iv) it has also been traced back to other ethnic groups in northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Ragnall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Gaelicized borrowing of Old Norse Rögnvaldr, a compound of regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + valdr ‘ruler’.

variants.name: Raonull
meanings: Gaelicized borrowing of Old Norse Rögnvaldr, a compound of regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + valdr ‘ruler’.

variants.name: Ronald
meanings: From the Old Norse personal name Rögnvaldr (composed of regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + valdr ‘ruler’). This name was regularly used in the Middle Ages in northern England and Scotland, where Scandinavian influence was strong. It is now widespread throughout the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Randal
meanings: Mainly U.S.: medieval vernacular form of   Randolf .  This was in common use as a given name into the 17th century and gave rise to a surname. In modern use the given name is often a transferred use of this surname.

variants.name: Rannal
meanings: Gaelicized borrowing of Old Norse Rögnvaldr, a compound of regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + valdr ‘ruler’.

en.lifeSummary: When Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles was born about 1148, in Morven, Argyll, Scotland, his father, Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles, was 36 and his mother, Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir, was 32. He married Fonia Moray about 1160, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 6 daughters. He registered for military service in 1192. He died in 1207, in Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 60, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles est né environ 1148, à Morven, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Fonia Moray environ 1160, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 6 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1192. Il est décédé en 1207, à Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles um 1148 in Morven, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles 36 und seine Mutter Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir 32. Er hat um 1160 in Scotland Fonia Moray geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er hat sich 1192 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1207 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles è nato il circa 1148 nel Morven, Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Fonia Moray circa 1160, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 6 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1192. Morì nel 1207, nel Argyll, Scotland, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Islesが約1148年にスコットランドアルグイルモーベンで生まれた時，父Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Islesは36歳，母Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottirは32歳であった。約1160年にスコットランドでFonia Morayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1192年に兵役登録をした。彼は1207年にスコットランドアルグイルで60歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles(이)가 대략 1148년 스컷랜드 아그이 모르븐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1160년 스컷랜드에서 Fonia Moray(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1192년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1207년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

mn.Morven, Argyle, Scotland: Morven, Argyle, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.<Of, Morven, Argyle, Scotland>: Morven, Argyle, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles nasceu aproximadamente 1148, em Morven, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Fonia Moray aproximadamente 1160, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1192. Ele faleceu em 1207, em Argyll, Scotland, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles родился около 1148 г. в местности морвен, аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Fonia Moray около 1160 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 6 дочерей. В 1192 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1207 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles nació aproximadamente 1148, en Morven, Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Fonia Moray aproximadamente 1160, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 6 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1192. Murió en 1207, en Argyll, Scotland, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
